channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Heatwave and Thunderstorm Alerts Issued for Multiple Districts in Maharashtra
item.description: The India Meteorological Department (IMD) has issued weather alerts for multiple regions across Maharashtra, forecasting both heatwave-like conditions and thunderstorms in the coming days. Districts s...

item.title: Suspect Arrested After Shooting at White House Correspondents’ Dinner
item.description: On Saturday, a shooting incident happened during the White House Correspondents’ Dinner at the Washington Hilton Hotel. Authorities arrested the suspect, Cole Tomas Allen, a 31-year-old man from Torra...

item.title: Trump Links Assassination Threats to His Political Impact After White House Dinner Shooting
item.description: United States President Donald Trump don talk about why he believes say people don dey target him for assassination, following one shooting incident wey scatter a major event for Washington. The incid...

item.title: Drouillard Road in Windsor Temporarily Closed for Spring Flea Market
item.description: On Sunday, residents and visitors in Windsor should be aware that Drouillard Road will be closed to accommodate the Ford City BIA Spring Flea Market. The event, organised by the local Business Improve...

item.title: White House Correspondents’ Dinner evacuated after armed suspect detained
item.description: On Saturday night, the White House Correspondents’ Association dinner in Washington was disrupted when a man approached a security checkpoint armed with multiple weapons. According to US President Don...

item.title: Trump recounts reaction to attempted shooting at White House correspondents’ dinner
item.description: On Saturday night, US President Donald Trump spoke for the first time about the attempted shooting at the White House Correspondents’ Association dinner. He said that when the incident occurred, he in...

item.title: Sabastian Sawe breaks marathon's 2-hour barrier at London Marathon 2026
item.description: Kenyan athlete Sabastian Sawe made history at the 2026 London Marathon by becoming the first man to break the 2-hour barrier, finishing the race in a remarkable 1:59:30. This groundbreaking achievemen...

item.title: Drua Fullback's Mistake Gifts Chiefs an Easy Try
item.description: In a stunning moment during a Super Rugby match, Drua fullback Ilaisa Droasese made a costly mistake, delivering a 'mind-boggling' kick that handed the Chiefs a try. The play, which has already been d...

item.title: Pre-mixed Canned Cocktails Gain Popularity Among UK Gen Z Despite Lower Overall Drinking Rates
item.description: Despite perceptions that Generation Z are teetotal or cautious about drinking, pre-mixed canned cocktails such as BuzzBallz have become increasingly popular among young adults in the UK. Viral TikTok ...

item.title: Russell Brand Faces Criticism Over Bible Reading and Past Sexual Misconduct Confession
item.description: Russell Brand, 50, the English actor turned right-wing podcaster, faced online ridicule after a televised interview in which he struggled to find a relevant Bible passage during his appearance on Pier...

item.title: Ukraine’s Use of Remote-Controlled Ground Robots in the War Against Russia
item.description: Ukrainian forces are increasingly deploying remote-controlled ground robots (UGVs) in their ongoing war with Russia, recognising their potential to shape the future of modern warfare. President Volody...

item.title: Kerala election 2026: Officials consider adding more counting tables in Paravur to avoid delay in result declaration
item.description: For the 2026 Kerala Assembly elections, polling officials in Ernakulam district are considering increasing the number of vote‑counting tables allotted to the Paravur Assembly constituency, where Oppos...

item.title: Key players set to influence Soweto derby between Orlando Pirates and Kaizer Chiefs
item.description: Orlando Pirates and Kaizer Chiefs are set to renew their fierce rivalry in the Soweto derby at FNB Stadium, with Pirates looking to extend their recent dominance after winning the last five league mee...

item.title: Armed suspect arrested after shooting incident disrupts White House Correspondents’ Dinner
item.description: An armed suspect was taken into custody after a shooting incident disrupted the White House Correspondents’ Dinner in Washington, DC, where President Donald Trump, cabinet members, journalists, and gu...

item.title: Obasanjo Appreciates IGP Disu For Support During 1995 House Arrest
item.description: Former President Olusegun Obasanjo don open mouth to thank Inspector-General of Police, Olatunji Disu, for wetin e do during the time wey he dey under house arrest in 1995 under Sani Abacha regime. Fo...

item.title: Opposition Parties Raise Alarm Over APC, Demand INEC Chairman’s Removal and Election Reforms
item.description: For Naija, ten opposition parties, including PDP, LP, ADC, NNPP, and Accord Party, don gather for National Summit for Ibadan to raise alarm say APC dey try turn Naija to one-party state. Dem release s...

item.title: Manitoba proposes first-in-Canada restrictions on youth access to social media and AI tools
item.description: The Manitoba government, led by Premier Wab Kinew, has announced plans to introduce legislation that would restrict young people’s access to social media platforms and artificial intelligence chatbots...

item.title: JM Ibarra explains purpose of topless scene in ‘Almost Us,’ says it serves the story
item.description: In an exclusive feature, actors JM Ibarra and Fyang Smith shared insights about a much-talked-about topless scene in their project “Almost Us.” According to the two, the scene was not included merely ...

item.title: Marcos assures continuity of government services amid energy crisis, emphasizes 4PH housing rollout
item.description: President Ferdinand “Bongbong” Marcos Jr. assured the public that government services will continue uninterrupted despite the country’s ongoing energy crisis, stressing that public service must not be...

item.title: Suspect Identified in White House Correspondents’ Dinner Shooting Incident
item.description: Authorities in the United States have identified Cole Tomas Allen, a 31-year-old man from Torrance, California, as the suspect involved in a shooting incident at the White House Correspondents’ Associ...
